topic: EITC tax credit refund up to $7,830 missed by 20% eligible
key_points: IRS EITC max 2024: $7,830 for 3+ kids, $632 single no kids
IRS estimates 20% eligible workers don't claim EITC
Income cap 2024: $66,819 married 3+ kids
Refundable credit, paid even if zero tax owed

topic: Child Tax Credit $2,000 per kid plus $1,700 refundable 2024
hook: $2,000 per kid the IRS owes you
key_points: IRS CTC 2024: $2,000 per qualifying child under 17
Refundable portion 2024: up to $1,700 per child
Phaseout starts $400K married, $200K single
Must have SSN issued before tax due date

topic: HSA triple tax advantage beats 401k after age 65
key_points: IRS 2024 HSA limit: $4,150 single, $8,300 family, $1,000 catchup 55+
Triple tax-free: contribution, growth, qualified withdrawal
After 65: penalty-free withdrawal for any reason, taxed as income
Receipts kept years can be reimbursed tax-free anytime

topic: FSA grace period vs $640 carryover most workers waste
key_points: IRS 2024 FSA limit: $3,200 employee contribution
IRS 2024 carryover max: $640 to next plan year
Grace period option: 2.5 months extra to spend
Use-it-or-lose-it forfeits average $370 per worker (EBRI 2023)

topic: Umbrella insurance $1M policy costs $200/year average
key_points: III: $1M umbrella averages $150-$300/year
Adds liability over auto and home limits
Covers lawsuits exceeding base policy limits
Recommended: coverage equal to net worth

topic: 1031 exchange defers $0 taxes on real estate gain
hook: Sell real estate, owe zero tax
key_points: IRS Section 1031: defer capital gains on like-kind exchange
45 days to identify replacement property
180 days to close on new property
Restricted to investment/business property since 2018

topic: Mortgage points cost 1% per point, save quarter rate
key_points: Freddie Mac: 1 point = 1% loan amount, ~0.25% rate cut
Break-even typically 5-7 years on 30-year mortgage
Points deductible if itemizing (IRS Pub 936)
Worth it only if staying past break-even

topic: ARM vs fixed mortgage 5/1 starts 0.5% lower 2024
key_points: Freddie Mac May 2024: 30-yr fixed 7.02%, 5/1 ARM 6.49%
ARM rate adjusts after intro period (5 yrs in 5/1)
Cap structure: 2/2/5 typical (initial/periodic/lifetime)
70% ARMs in 2008 led to defaults per Fed Reserve

topic: 529 plan vs Coverdell ESA $2,000 cap kills Coverdell
key_points: Coverdell ESA: $2,000/year max contribution per child (IRS)
529 plans: no federal contribution cap, $19K gift tax limit 2025
Both grow tax-free, qualified withdrawals tax-free
529 funds K-12 up to $10K/year (TCJA expansion)

topic: FAFSA assets parents counted 5.64% vs student 20%
key_points: FAFSA EFC: parent assets count 5.64% max
Student-owned assets count 20% in EFC formula
529 owned by parent counted as parent asset
Retirement accounts excluded from FAFSA assets

topic: POD bank account skips probate beneficiary gets cash
hook: POD beats trust for cash accounts
key_points: FDIC: Payable-on-Death adds beneficiary, no probate
Beneficiary access immediate with death certificate
POD increases FDIC insurance to $250K per beneficiary
Free at most banks, no attorney needed

topic: Beneficiary designation overrides will 100% of time
key_points: 401k, IRA, life insurance pass by beneficiary form
ERISA mandates spouse as 401k beneficiary unless waived
Outdated beneficiaries cause $$ to ex-spouse (Egelhoff v Egelhoff 2001)
Review after marriage, divorce, birth, death

topic: FBAR filing required $10K foreign accounts $10K penalty
key_points: FinCEN 114: required if foreign accounts >$10K aggregate
Non-willful penalty: $10K per violation per year
Willful penalty: greater of $100K or 50% account balance
Due April 15, automatic Oct 15 extension

topic: TIPS vs I bonds Treasury inflation hedges 2024 rates
hook: TIPS vs I bonds key tradeoff
key_points: I bonds May 2024 rate: 4.28% (1.30% fixed + 2.96% inflation)
I bond limit: $10K/year per SSN at TreasuryDirect
TIPS: traded on secondary market, no purchase cap
TIPS taxed annually on inflation adjustment (phantom income)

topic: Retiree side hustle Social Security earnings limit $22,320
key_points: SSA 2024 earnings limit before FRA: $22,320
$1 reduction per $2 earned over limit before FRA
Year reaching FRA: $59,520 limit, $1 per $3 over
After FRA: no earnings limit at all

topic: Student side hustle 1099 self-employment $400 threshold
key_points: IRS: self-employment tax due if net >$400
SE tax rate: 15.3% (12.4% SS + 2.9% Medicare)
Schedule C profit subject to income tax + SE tax
Quarterly estimated taxes due if owing >$1,000

topic: Stay-at-home parent spousal IRA $7,000 contribution 2024
key_points: Spousal IRA allows non-working spouse to contribute
Working spouse income must cover both contributions
Must file jointly to use spousal IRA

topic: Salary negotiation script 7-15% raise average per ASA
key_points: Society for Human Resource Management: 84% employers expect negotiation
Robert Half 2023: avg raise from negotiation 7.4%
Open with: 'Based on market data and my contributions'
Cite Glassdoor/Levels.fyi data for role

topic: Medical bill negotiation 30-50% off if asked Bankrate
key_points: Bankrate 2023: 70% who negotiate medical bills get reduction
Average reduction: 30-50% of original bill
Ask for itemized bill first, check CPT code errors
Hospital charity care: required if non-profit (501r)

topic: Rent negotiation off-season Nov-Feb saves 5-10% Zillow
key_points: Zillow research: 50% more vacancies Nov-Feb

12-month leases beat 6-month rates by ~5%

topic: Internet bill 25% cut threatening cancellation per Consumer Reports
key_points: Consumer Reports 2023: 51% who called got bill cut

ACP discount $30/month phased out June 2024

topic: Car dealer negotiation invoice price plus 2-5% Edmunds
key_points: Edmunds: target 2-5% above dealer invoice
Negotiate out-the-door price, not monthly payment

topic: Crypto cost basis tracking IRS Form 8949 every trade taxable
key_points: IRS Notice 2014-21: crypto = property, not currency
Form 8949 + Schedule D required for each disposal
FIFO default unless specific identification chosen
1099-DA broker reporting starts 2025 (Form 1099-DA)

topic: Crypto wash sale rule loophole closing soon
key_points: IRS wash sale rule (Section 1091) applies to securities
Crypto = property, not security under current IRS rules
Bidens FY2024 budget proposed extending to crypto
Allows tax loss harvesting + immediate rebuy

topic: Loss aversion 2x stronger than gain Kahneman Nobel
key_points: Kahneman/Tversky 1979: loss aversion ratio 2.0-2.5
Won 2002 Nobel Prize in Economics
Causes investors hold losers too long, sell winners early
Disposition effect: 50% more likely to sell winners (Odean 1998)

topic: Mental accounting why $5 tax refund feels like windfall
hook: Why refunds feel like free money
key_points: Thaler 1985: mental accounting separates money pools
Tax refunds spent 2x faster than equal regular income

Adjust W-4 to keep money throughout year

topic: Opportunity Zone investment defers gain to 2027 tax
key_points: TCJA 2017 created Opportunity Zones (Section 1400Z-2)

topic: R&D tax credit small business up to $500K against payroll
key_points: IRC Section 41: R&D credit for qualified research
PATH Act 2015: startups offset payroll tax up to $250K

topic: Expat tax FEIE excludes $126,500 foreign earned income 2024
key_points: IRS FEIE 2024: $126,500 foreign earned income excluded

topic: I bond fixed rate 1.30% locks 30 years May 2024
key_points: TreasuryDirect May 2024 I bond: 1.30% fixed + 2.96% inflation
Fixed rate stays for 30-year life of bond

topic: HSA invest balance vs cash 92% leave money in cash
key_points: EBRI 2023: only 8% of HSA holders invest balance

topic: Saver's Credit up to $2,000 tax credit retirement contributions
key_points: IRS Saver's Credit 2024: 50%, 20%, or 10% of contributions

topic: 401k Roth vs Traditional break-even tax bracket math
key_points: Vanguard: Roth wins if retirement bracket equals or exceeds current

topic: QCD age 70.5 IRA donate up to $105,000 skip income 2024
key_points: IRS QCD limit 2024: $105,000 from IRA to qualified charity

topic: RMD age 73 now 75 by 2033 SECURE 2.0 changes
key_points: SECURE 2.0 Act 2022: RMD age 73 starting 2023

topic: Step-up basis erases capital gains heirs zero tax

topic: Gift tax annual exclusion $19,000 per person 2025
key_points: IRS 2025 annual gift exclusion: $19,000 per recipient

topic: Solo 401k self-employed $69,000 limit 2024 vs SEP $69,000

topic: Medicare HSA prohibited 6-month lookback enrollment trap

topic: FDIC vs SIPC insurance differ what each covers

topic: Authorized user piggyback parent score boost no payments

topic: Inflation breakeven 5-year TIPS spread Treasury market signal
key_points: 5-yr breakeven = 5-yr nominal yield - 5-yr TIPS yield

topic: Sunk cost fallacy 80% finish bad investments per studies
hook: Don't throw good money after bad
key_points: Arkes/Blumer 1985: sunk costs increase persistence
Past money paid is irrelevant to future decisions
Common in stock holding, home renovation overruns
Question: 'Would I buy this today at current price?'

topic: Recency bias investors chase 1-yr returns Morningstar gap
key_points: Morningstar 2023 'Mind the Gap': investor returns 1.7% below funds

topic: Confirmation bias killing portfolio diversification active funds
key_points: Wason 1960: people seek info confirming beliefs 4:1

topic: TFSA Canadian equivalent Americans miss Roth IRA

topic: Cash balance plan owner $300K+ deduction over 50

topic: Mega backdoor Roth $46K after-tax 401k convert

topic: Tax loss harvesting $3,000 ordinary income offset annually
key_points: IRS: $3,000 capital losses offset ordinary income/year

topic: Direct indexing $100K+ minimum tax-loss harvest stocks

topic: Health share ministries not insurance no ACA protection

topic: Auto extended warranty 55% never used Consumer Reports

topic: Roth conversion ladder early retirement bridge 5-year rule
key_points: IRS: 5-year wait per conversion before tax-free withdrawal

topic: 72(t) SEPP early IRA withdraw avoid 10% penalty
key_points: IRC 72(t): substantially equal periodic payments

topic: ABLE account disability $18K/year don't lose Medicaid
key_points: IRS ABLE: disabled save up to $18K/year 2024

topic: Special needs trust supplemental SSI Medicaid preserved

topic: PTET state tax workaround SALT cap $10K bypass for owners
